rationale: Both correctly land on the ground truth's 'duplicate of #4808' verdict, but X confidently asserts #4808 is 'merged into main' and fabricates specific 'verified on main' details (exact comment text, line contents) that it had no way to check from a read-only rebase-branch checkout — a confident, ungrounded claim. Y actually checked PR metadata, found #4808 is CLOSED with mergedAt null, flagged the contradiction explicitly, and hedged appropriately about what it could not verify from its own checkout. Y also surfaces a concrete, checkable gap (missing diffusion path in the regression test's _STALE_API_FILES list), making it more useful and better grounded despite the ground truth being terse.
